# openai_project_users (Data Source)

List users in a project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_project_users" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `users` (Attributes List) Users returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `added_at` (Number) added at
- `email` (String) email
- `id` (String) id
- `name` (String) name
- `role` (String) role
